## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash -n setup.sh` and `python3 -m py_compile tailor/tailor.py` (as applicable).
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] I bumped `VERSION` if this changes behavior or the public interface (SemVer).
- [ ] No personal data is included in this PR (no real config.json, contacts, or resumes).
- [ ] Human-in-the-loop and local-first guardrails are preserved.
